content.en:
"Suppression?"

Ye Tian tried to step through the door and enter the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, but he felt the oppression from the door.

This gate was able to allow the top ancestor to enter easily, but Ye Tian's copy body had reached the level of the strongest ancestor, so it was restricted by the door.

Of course, Ye Tian can also forcibly enter, but he needs to pay some price.

Wow!!!!!

A large amount of energy resources were taken out by Ye Tian and integrated into the door, making the light of the door shine brightly.

At the same time, Ye Tian forcibly passed through the door, and was counterattacked by the door, even if after passing through the door, his body would be injured and his strength would decrease, but it didn't matter.

With his current strength, even if his strength decreased, he could suppress the ordinary Supreme Holy Beast.

Bang!!!!!

Ye Tian forcibly crossed the door and entered the Sacred Realm.

The Sea and Sky Holy Sect was preparing for the Great Tribulation, and although there were many holy beasts guarding the gate, the two strongest holy beasts were not here.

When Ye Tian came to the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth, he killed these holy beasts and a large number of ordinary disciples of the Sea and Sky Holy Sect in an instant, and even the top holy beasts couldn't withstand Ye Tian's blow.

For foreign beasts and creatures in foreign lands, Ye Tian didn't have any thoughts of pity.

There were three great tribulations in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and each of them was wiped out by the Exotic Heaven and Earth, leaving only a few top ancestors alive, so why should he have any pity for the other Exotic Heavens and Earths? Even if he wiped out the creatures of the Sanctuary Heaven and Earth, it was nothing.

The headquarters of the Haitian Holy Sect was not very far from the door, and at this time, the Wolf Bone Holy Beast and the Violent Ape Holy Beast knew Ye Tian's path, and they were very shocked and puzzled.

They don't know much about the Dark Forbidden Realm of this era, but they know very well that there is absolutely no Supreme Ancestor in this era of the Dark Forbidden Domain, after all, they can't go to other foreign worlds, and they don't have the origin rules of other foreign worlds in their hands, how can they impact the Supreme Ancestor realm?

But now, from the Dark Forbidden Realm, there is actually a supreme ancestor?

"Kill him, this gate cannot be lost, the catastrophe is coming, we can't let the Supreme Ancestor of the Dark Forbidden Realm destroy everything we have!"

The Wolf Bone Sacred Beast and the Violent Ape Sacred Beast thought to themselves.

They felt that the three supreme holy beasts of the Sea and Sky Holy Sect should have great hope of killing a supreme ancestor who had just passed through the door and his strength was weakened.

"Heyuan Holy Beast, let's strike together and kill this Supreme Ancestor!"

The wolf bone holy beast said.

Rumble!!!!

The three supreme holy beasts instantly killed Ye Tian from the headquarters of the Sea and Sky Holy Sect.

At the same time, the other holy beasts retreated one after another, and they couldn't interfere in the battle at the level of the Supreme Sacred Beast Supreme Ancestor, otherwise a ripple would kill them.

At this moment, the Heyuan Holy Beast changed its attack route and blasted at the weakest Wolf Bone Holy Beast with one blow.

The Wolf Bone Sacred Beast didn't expect the Heyuan Holy Beast to attack him at all, so it didn't have any defense.

Suddenly, the wolf bone holy beast was blasted out with a blow, and the injury was not light.

And at this time, Ye Tian's attack also came.

Ye Tian didn't spare the slightest hand, showing the attack of the second level of the Supreme Ancestor, although his strength was weakened by the door counterattack, but the attack power still reached the second level of the Supreme Ancestor.

"Hegemony Supreme Ancestral Technique!"

This blow steadily bombarded the body of the wolf bone holy beast.

Suddenly, the wolf bone holy beast was blown up, and although it condensed its body again, the wounds on its body continued to crack and could not heal at all.

At this moment, he was extremely injured.

"The second level of the Supreme Ancestor!"

The wolf bone holy beast was stunned.

There is only one Supreme Sacred Beast that has reached the second level in the entire Sacred Domain, and there was not a single Supreme Ancestor before the Dark Forbidden Domain, and now there is a second level Supreme Ancestor suddenly appearing, this is too dreamy, right?

"Violent Ape Holy Beast, run away!"

The Wolf Bone Sacred Beast shouted.

He couldn't escape, after all, he was seriously injured, whether it was Ye Tian or Heyuan Holy Beast, they would not let him go.

On the contrary, it is a violent ape holy beast, and there is still hope of escaping.

The Violent Ape Holy Beast knew that it couldn't compete with Ye Tian, so it didn't dare to stay here, and immediately began to flee, while the Wolf Bone Holy Beast desperately tried its life to stop Ye Tian.

In the end, the Violent Ape Holy Beast still fled, while the Wolf Bone Holy Beast was killed by Ye Tian.

Regarding the escape of the Violent Ape Holy Beast, Ye Tian didn't care at all.

He was not a third-level Supreme Ancestor, otherwise he would have easily killed these two Supreme Sacred Beasts.

Next, Ye Tian let the Heyuan Holy Beast manage the Haitian Holy Sect, of course, there will be many rebels.

And Ye Tian showed no mercy, no matter who resisted, he directly bombarded and killed.

In a short period of time, the almost ordinary holy beasts of the Haitian Holy Sect were bombarded and killed, and some of the holy beasts escaped, leaving only a few holy beasts loyal to the Heyuan holy beasts, and most of the foreign beasts under the holy beasts surrendered, they did not dare to resist, and the catastrophe came, they had no way to survive outside, they had to rely on the strongest holy beasts to have any hope of survival, so they naturally did not dare to resist.

In this way, Ye Tian was initially in control of the Haitian Holy Sect.

......

The Sanctuary Heaven and Earth, a silent void.

The Tyrannical Ape Sacred Beast struck this void with great rage, roaring madly.

"Heyuan Holy Beast, why ????"

He couldn't understand why the Heyuan Holy Beast would help the Strongest Ancestor of the Dark Forbidden Realm?

Even if the Heyuan Holy Beast had a deal with the people of the Dark Forbidden Realm, would he not be able to deal with the Heyuan Holy Beast?

Even if that Supreme Ancestor was very powerful, but the combined efforts of the three of their three Supreme Sacred Beasts might be able to barely compete with that Supreme Ancestor, and they would not end up like this.

"Damn Heyuan Holy Beast, if you take refuge in the strongest ancestor of the Dark Forbidden Realm, they won't reuse you, maybe they will destroy you one day, why are you so stupid! They are of a foreign race, why are you of the same mind as a foreign race?"

The Storm Ape Sacred Beast didn't understand, and there was no way to understand it.

However, he didn't know that the Heyuan Holy Beast was Ye Tian's doppelganger, which was equivalent to Ye Tian himself, helping himself, which was naturally normal.

Haitian Holy Sect.

Ye Tian began to attract the power of the gate, and began to create a forbidden place in the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth to prepare for the ancestors of the human race to enter here in the future.

Before, Ye Tian didn't know how to build a gate, nor did he know how to build a forbidden land.

But when the Heyuan Holy Beast became the strongest Holy Beast, the Wolf Bone Holy Beast told the Heyuan Holy Beast, coupled with the construction method obtained from the Wolf Bone Holy Beast, it was confirmed that there was nothing to hide, and now it is natural to build a forbidden land base.

The so-called forbidden land base is to attract power from the door, change the rules of an area, and turn it into a forbidden land, as long as the door is not destroyed, the forbidden land will not dissipate.

Ye Tian can also build the gate by himself, but the cost of building the door is too great, he must capture the illusory gate of heaven and earth, and then fuse countless materials to build the eternal gate.

One Dark Calendar will give birth to an illusory door, and nine Dark Calendars will give birth to nine gates.

Previously, the Dark Forbidden Realm had also given birth to illusory gates, but he didn't know how to build them, so he didn't occupy them.

In addition, there is no way to control which exotic world the door will connect, as long as the coordinates of an exotic world are locked, the door can be temporarily modified to connect the formulated exotic world.

In that case, it will be very troublesome.

Now, Ye Tian didn't have time to wait, so he could only use this gate of the Haitian Holy Sect.

In short, this gate now belongs to him, to the human race!
